admin.answerFlexibilityNote: System supports both numeric indices (0-N) and letter labels (e.g., \u0027A\u0027, \u0027B)\u0027, \u0027C) Text\u0027).
admin.examsSubtitle: ParameTRIZation of evaluation algorithms and templates.
admin.noConfigs: No active configurations. Create the first one to begin.
admin.feedbackDesc: Shows the explanation after each response (Training Mode).
admin.skipDesc: Enables the option to skip tasks and resolve them later.
admin.reviewDesc: Allows the user to go back and modify previous answers.
admin.autoAdvanceDesc: Instantly jumps to the next question upon selecting an option.
admin.reviewOmittedDesc: Presents a review loop at the end to answer blank questions.
admin.excludeCorrectDesc: Filters out previously answered questions to focus on weak areas and maximize learning efficiency.
admin.adaptiveDesc: Prioritizes questions from modules and difficulties with lowest historical success rates to reinforce weak areas.
admin.sliceOptionsDesc: Reduce the number of options shown per question. 0 = all, 2+ = only that many options (including the correct one).
admin.scoringSimpleDesc: Each correct answer adds fixed points.
admin.pointsPerCorrectDesc: Base value for each correct response
admin.penaltyPerIncorrectDesc: Points to subtract per incorrect response
admin.assignmentsSubtitle: Scheduling of exam calls, time windows, and access control.
admin.noAssignments: NO ASSIGNMENTS DETECTED UNDER THESE PARAMETERS
admin.publishConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to publish this assignment? Users will be able to view and take the exam within the configured time window.
admin.archiveConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to archive this assignment? Users will no longer be able to access the exam.
admin.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this assignment? This action cannot be undone.
admin.validationInvalidDates: End date must be after start date

admin.roleLiteralsDesc: Configure how contextual roles are displayed in your tenant. Each role has a label in Spanish (es) and English (en).
admin.brandCardDesc: Customize logos, favicons, and corporate color palettes in real time. CSS variables are dynamically injected in client SSR preventing FOUC.
admin.spaceCardDesc: Manage the internal hierarchy of the tenant (classrooms, departments, and venues) via self-managed materialized paths with secure cascade modifications.
admin.tenantCardDesc: Control and manage all corporate organizations and ecosystem licenses, define isolated databases, industry categories, and global subscription policies.
admin.permissionsCardDesc: Define access groups with recursive hierarchy and granular ABAC policies. Permissions are automatically inherited from parent groups to children.
admin.brandCardDescFull: Adjust visual parameters for \u003ctenant\u003e{tenantName}\u003c/tenant\u003e. Changes will impact all users instantly.

gdpr.warning: This action is irreversible. Personal data will be anonymized across all satellites.
gdpr.gdprSubtitle: Permanent erasure of all data for a specific user across all satellites. This action cannot be undone.
gdpr.exportRequiredFields: Tenant ID and User ID are required
gdpr.toastSuperAdminOnly: Only SUPER_ADMIN role is authorized to physically purge organizations.
gdpr.gdprDesc: This panel provides centralized tools for data sovereignty and portability. Administrators can instantly download a complete dump of tenant data in ZIP format (Portability), and Super Administrators can definitively and irreversibly purge all tenant information across the microservices network (Right to be Forgotten).
gdpr.purgeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to purge the organization '{tenantId}'? This action is definitive and will physically delete all Quiz, Files, Logs databases and the central Governance registry. It cannot be undone.

sandbox.configureDesc: Define the claims that will be injected into the encrypted session cookie.
sandbox.name: Name
sandbox.licensedAppsDesc: Uncheck applications to simulate license disconnection (QA Sandbox).
sandbox.jwtEncryptedNote: The generated token is encrypted locally using the shared development key.
sandbox.sandboxNoticeDesc: Instant shifting rewrites your local abd_session cookie. This will switch your identity across all local satellites running under .abdia.es or localhost.

admin.delegationsDesc: Manage temporary delegated permissions for tenant users.
admin.delegationsRevokeDialogMessage: Are you sure you want to revoke this delegation early?
admin.promptTemplatesDesc: Manage LLM prompt templates for AI question generation | Tenant: {tenantId}
admin.noObjectivesFilter: No objectives match this filter in the exam.
admin.gdprPageDesc: Orchestrate GDPR Right to be Forgotten across all satellites. This will anonymize or delete the user's personal data in every service.
admin.storageProviderDesc: Configure S3, Cloudinary or Drive credentials for document management.
admin.sandboxDesc: Local console to inject test JWTs, simulate license disconnection, and perform instant role shifts.
admin.gdprPortabilityDesc: Encrypted ZIP downloads of tenant data and requests for right to be forgotten (physical purge).
admin.quizRolesDesc: Gestiona los roles contextuales del ecosistema de aprendizaje (CREATOR / AUDITOR) por ámbito (Space, Course, ExamConfig).
admin.telemetryCardDesc: Visual monitoring of operational volume, security, and real-time SaaS activity.
admin.complianceCardDesc: Data portability (encrypted ZIP) and Right to be Forgotten via log anonymization.
admin.threatCardDesc: Predictive anomaly engine: brute force, mass deletions, off-hours access, and unknown IPs.
admin.integrity_desc: Verifies the cryptographic chaining (SHA-256) of audit logs to guarantee no entry has been modified, deleted, or altered since creation. SOC2 requirement.
admin.chain_valid_desc: All hashes and blocks link correctly. No alterations detected.

adminPortal.remediationIdsRemember: Remember decision for the rest of the batch

adminPortal.selectContextSkipDesc: Ingest the questions without Space or Course. They can be manually assigned later.
adminPortal.remediationConflictsSubtitle: Detected {count} potential conflicts between questions in the batch.
adminPortal.remediationConflictsLevel2Desc: Both questions have the same normalized prompt but different options or correct answer.
adminPortal.remediationConflictsLevel3Desc: These questions have very similar prompts (similarity: {score}%).
adminPortal.remediationConflictsResolvedCount: {count, plural, one {# conflict resolved} other {# conflicts resolved}}
adminPortal.remediationSubtitle: Detected {count} of {total} questions with incomplete metadata (Module, Source or Difficulty). How do you want to proceed?
adminPortal.remedOption1Desc: Provide a module, source or difficulty value and apply it to all incomplete questions.
adminPortal.remedOption2Desc: Visualize the prompts and manually enter the missing fields sequentially.
adminPortal.remedOption3Desc: Ingest the corpus without remediating. The system will fill with generic defaults.
adminPortal.bulkRemedDesc: Define the values to inject into all incomplete questions in this import batch.
adminPortal.adminDescriptionFull: Federated control console and hot governance for tenant <tenant>{tenantId}</tenant>.

home.tagline: High-performance multipurpose enterprise platform for governance, telemetry, and management of your organization.
home.trainingDesc: Immediate feedback, detailed explanations and no global time pressure. Ideal for building foundations.
home.mockDesc: Real conditions. 10 minutes, 30s per task, no way back. The definitive test.
home.sidebarNotice: Or utilize the left control sidebar panel
home.feature1Desc: Real-time tactical simulation with integrated global stopwatch and question-specific countdown logical loops.
home.feature2Desc: Complete enforcement of simple, incorrect-penalty, and weighted difficulty coefficient evaluation schemes.
home.feature3Desc: Strict Zod validation of content schemas and batch deduplication via SHA-256 hashes to preserve corpus purity.
home.examsDescription: Select a simulation template to begin your technical evaluation. All timing and scoring parameters will be enforced automatically.
home.loginHint: Sign in utilizing your federated credentials from ABDAuth
home.ingestionApiDesc: High-performance, non-blocking ingestion via REST API secured with inter-service Bearer tokens.
home.centralizedAuditDesc: Unified real-time query and inspection of technical and operational activity logs across the ABD ecosystem.
home.dynamicFilterDesc: Interactive filtering by source application (Auth, Quiz, Governance) and organization with automatic aggregation.
home.hotWhitelabelingDesc: Dynamic generation of HSL and YIQ Contrast custom tokens rendered during server-side SSR loops to secure zero visual flicker.
home.spaceHierarchiesDesc: Logic boundaries and role isolation calculated inside data repositories with recursive materialized subdivisions.
home.cryptographicSecurityDesc: Symmetric AES-256-CBC envelope encryption protecting customer configuration and sensitive billing fields in the database.
home.analyticsDesc: Unified dashboard and business telemetry across your entire organization.
home.authDesc: Federated identity provider with MFA, Passkeys and multi-tenant SSO support.
home.logsDesc: Immutable audit log and enterprise-scale event traceability.
home.filesDesc: Secure document management and polymorphic storage with retention control and versioning.
home.quizDesc: Adaptive assessment engine with advanced distractor analytics and performance tracking.
home.governanceDesc: Organization, permissions, licensing and tenant lifecycle management.
home.cryptfileDesc: Encryption and secure management of sensitive files with role-based access control.
home.noAppsDesc: Your user does not have permission to access any ecosystem applications in this organization.

landing.hero_subtitle: The core identity backbone for the ABD Ecosystem. Federated security, multitenant isolation, and immutable audit logs.
